# lightdash_project_upstream (Resource)

Manages the upstream project relationship for a Lightdash project (Data Ops). Content promotion copies charts and dashboards from a source project (for example development or preview) into the configured upstream project. This resource sets that upstream link; it does not promote content itself. Destroying the resource clears the upstream project UUID on the source project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "lightdash_project_upstream" "example" {
  organization_uuid     = "org-1234567890"
  project_uuid          = "proj-dev-1234567890"
  upstream_project_uuid = "proj-prod-1234567890"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Lightdash organization.
- `project_uuid` (String) The UUID of the source Lightdash project (for example a development or preview project).
- `upstream_project_uuid` (String) The UUID of the upstream (destination) project used for content promotion.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The resource identifier. It is computed as `organizations/<organization_uuid>/projects/<project_uuid>/upstream`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import lightdash_project_upstream.example "organizations/${organization_uuid}/projects/${project_uuid}/upstream"
```
